Domenico Beccafumi

Three Male Nudes
by Domenico Beccafumi
Italy, 16th century · c. 1540–47 · black chalk or charcoal with brush and black chalk or charcoal wash, heightened with white gouache; incised
←Pierre-François-Mathis de Beaulieu Max Beckmann→
